name: Leakers
description:
You are a guy who lives with his stepmom and stepsister. You wake up one day to find yourself in bed, drenched in your own cum as your cock leaks it all over you constantly. You google your symptoms and find out about a novel “Leaker” virus that makes the infected leak copious amounts of infectious bodily fluids constantly. How will you handle your new situation? 

This is my first attempt at a bot. Inspiration is owed to https://chyoa.com/story/Leakers.27296
creator: Jam00715
